title: Help with mirrors and connections

posts.author: SuperNinja (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sem título-2025-05-20-14401920×1899 188 KB

Hi there,

I’m trying to clarify the best way to approach this setup, and I hope my explanation makes sense.

Our main goal is to eliminate the need for multiple boards divided by sector and instead unify everything within a single project board.
Specifically, we want to centralize all customer-related information inside the project, so nothing is managed outside of it.

In terms of task organization, we’d love to hear any suggestions you might have for managing tasks by sector within this single project board.

Here’s what we’re currently doing:

  • We’ve created a template board used to generate new projects within our portfolio board.
  • In this template, we use items as tasks and subitems as subtasks.
  • Each group in the template represents a different sector (e.g., Commercial, Finance, Engineering, etc.).

Is there a more efficient or scalable way to structure this within Monday.com? Any best practices or features you’d recommend (like views, automations, or dashboards) would be really helpful.

Thanks in advance for your support!
